title: sankaranlab/chip_resilience
author: Agarwal, Gaurav
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: R code for scRNA-seq analysis (from raw data to differential gene expression), as described in manuscript, "Inherited resilience to clonal hematopoiesis by modifying stem cell RNA regulation" (https://doi.org/10.1101/2025.03.24.645017).
steps_raw: R code for scRNA-seq analysis (from raw data to differential gene expression), as described in manuscript, "Inherited resilience to clonal hematopoiesis by modifying stem cell RNA regulation" (https://doi.org/10.1101/2025.03.24.645017).
